mechanism_question: Instruct source sets the general, safety, and instruction-following control floor.
eval_command: python scripts/run_vllm_downstream_eval.py --base-url http://127.0.0.1:8100/v1 --models candidate_source_qwen3_30b_instruct --tasks gsm8k,mmlu,safety,humaneval_compile --example-source datasets --max-examples 64 --output-dir results/vllm_checkpoint_eval/source_qwen3_30b_instruct
notes: Source endpoint for Qwen3-30B-A3B-Instruct-2507; compare candidate quality against this anchor on the same vLLM eval tasks.

mechanism_question: Coder source sets the code-specialized control floor.
eval_command: python scripts/run_vllm_downstream_eval.py --base-url http://127.0.0.1:8101/v1 --models candidate_source_qwen3_30b_coder --tasks gsm8k,mmlu,safety,humaneval_compile --example-source datasets --max-examples 64 --output-dir results/vllm_checkpoint_eval/source_qwen3_30b_coder
notes: Source endpoint for Qwen3-Coder-30B-A3B-Instruct; needed to measure whether the route-guarded average preserves coding behavior.

mechanism: freeze router + route-conditioned expert weights + small attention step
mechanism_question: Does preserving the original router while moving route-relevant experts keep both source abilities?
notes: Qwen3-30B Instruct/Coder same-shape route-guarded candidate. It has been materialized locally; host it if the ignored safetensors checkpoint is present.

mechanism_question: Are the largest routed-expert deltas harmful enough that clipping them improves downstream behavior?
eval_command: python scripts/run_vllm_downstream_eval.py --base-url http://127.0.0.1:8103/v1 --models candidate_qwen3_moe_audit_gated_candidate --tasks gsm8k,mmlu,safety,humaneval_compile --example-source datasets --max-examples 64 --output-dir results/vllm_checkpoint_eval/qwen3_moe_audit_gated_candidate
notes: Qwen3-30B route-guarded candidate with additional safetensors-delta audit cap on high-relative-move expert rules. Writer dry-run is validated; materialize before vLLM eval.

mechanism_question: Do internal MoE risk signals predict which expert deltas need a smaller trust region?
notes: Qwen3-30B route-guarded candidate with MoE trust-region caps from route load, category specialization, router fragility, and materialized delta audit probes. Dry-run is validated; materialize before vLLM eval.

mechanism: trust-region experts + frozen shared attention + frozen router
mechanism_question: Is the shared attention Coder delta useful, or is expert-only movement the safer unified rule?
notes: Ablation of the trust-region candidate that freezes shared attention while keeping routed expert trust-region rules. Use it to test whether Coder attention deltas help or hurt under the same vLLM tasks.

mechanism: expert-only + second-stage routed-expert tail cap at 0.65
mechanism_question: Does removing the remaining high-tail expert deltas preserve utility while lowering risk?
notes: Second-stage routed-expert tail trim from the expert-only candidate. Shared attention and router remain frozen; remaining high-tail expert groups are scaled toward a 0.65 relative-delta cap.

mechanism: freeze router/attention + source-route expert weights + searched uniform 0.65 cap
mechanism_question: Can a simple searched 0.65 cap replace the hand-built route/load/category risk penalties?
notes: Searched Qwen3 MoE cap-law candidate: freeze router and shared attention, keep source-route-conditioned expert weights, and replace hand-built risk penalties with a simple global 0.65 routed-expert relative-delta cap.

mechanism: freeze router/attention + source-route expert weights + importance-guided layer/chunk coefficients
mechanism_question: Do layer sensitivity coefficients reduce harmful movement without removing useful Coder specialization?
eval_command: python scripts/run_vllm_downstream_eval.py --base-url http://127.0.0.1:8108/v1 --models candidate_qwen3_moe_layer_chunk_candidate --tasks gsm8k,mmlu,safety,humaneval_compile --example-source datasets --max-examples 64 --output-dir results/vllm_checkpoint_eval/qwen3_moe_layer_chunk_candidate
notes: Layer/chunk sensitivity candidate: freeze router and shared attention, keep source-route-conditioned expert weights, then shrink Coder contribution by layer sensitivity coefficients from the mechanism leverage probe.

mechanism: mechanism-optimized same-shape MoE average with frozen router/attention and threshold-efficient 0.65 expert cap
mechanism_question: Does the unified mechanism optimizer produce a candidate that survives source dominance and downstream task gates?
required_controls: both sources; searched_no_gt065 alias; router calibration selector
notes: Unified mechanism optimizer selected the threshold-efficient uniform 0.65 cap. Its 5243 tensor rules match searched_no_gt065 exactly, so the existing materialized checkpoint is reused for vLLM evaluation under the unified-method name.
